verses.text: That which was 'from the beginning,' which we 'heard,' 'seen,' and 'handled,' the Word of life, we declare. Eyewitness Word. The eternal Life appeared and was truly seen.
That which was 'from the beginning,' which we 'heard,' 'seen,' and 'handled,' the Word of life, we declare. Eyewitness Word. The eternal Life appeared and was truly seen.
We declare it that you may have fellowship with us, and with the Father and Son, that your joy may be full. Shared joy. Fellowship with God completes our joy.
We declare it that you may have fellowship with us, and with the Father and Son, that your joy may be full. Shared joy. Fellowship with God completes our joy.
'God is light, and in him is no darkness'; if we walk in light, 'the blood of Jesus Christ... cleanseth us from all sin.' Cleansing light. Walking in light, His blood keeps us clean.
'God is light, and in him is no darkness'; if we walk in light, 'the blood of Jesus Christ... cleanseth us from all sin.' Cleansing light. Walking in light, His blood keeps us clean.
'God is light, and in him is no darkness'; if we walk in light, 'the blood of Jesus Christ... cleanseth us from all sin.' Cleansing light. Walking in light, His blood keeps us clean.
'If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves'; but 'if we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive.' Confess. Honest confession finds full forgiveness.
